name: ACTELIS NETWORKS INC
business: Actelis Networks provides cyber-hardened, rapid-deployment networking solutions for wide-area applications including federal and military, state and local government, intelligent traffic systems, and IoT environments such as utility and rail, using hybrid fiber-copper technology. The company also serves Multi-Dwelling Units and offers AI-based cyber monitoring and protection software through its Cyber Aware Networking initiative.
namedCustomers: U.S. military (Air Force, Navy, National Guard)

exposures.sentence: The second shift is to defense and advanced defense technologies, shaped by current geopolitical tension and realizations many countries, including the United States, are making.
Through our Cyber Aware Networking initiative, we provide AI-based cyber monitoring and protection software for all edge devices, enhancing cyber security and resilience.
The first major shift is the accelerating rise of AI adoption, which demands ever-expanding computational resources to sustain its growth.
Edge AI, also covered as edge computing, according to Grandview research is projected to grow from approximately $20 billion in 2024 to nearly $190 billion in 2033.

By offering the ability to combine power delivery over the same existing copper and coax lines that we use for high-speed data, we believe our solutions are solving yet another important challenge in connecting hard-to-reach locations
In December 2024, we launched our MetaShield AI-Powered SaaS solution, under Actelis Cyber Aware Networking initiative.

catalysts.event: Launch of MetaShield AI-Powered SaaS solution
catalysts.sentence: In December 2024, we launched our MetaShield AI-Powered SaaS solution, under Actelis Cyber Aware Networking initiative.

catalysts.event: Introduction of next-generation Gigaline product families
catalysts.sentence: In 2023, we introduced the next-generation product families for hybrid-fiber-copper (or in short hybrid-fiber) Gigabit grade connectivity under the product family name, Gigaline or GL.

catalysts.event: Expansion of offering with launch for large Coax environments
catalysts.sentence: In 2025, we expanded our offering with the launch for large Coax environments, expanded our offering with fiber only solutions and introduced the MetaShield cyber-aware networking product family.

catalysts.event: First hotel implementation in the U.S.
catalysts.sentence: In 2025, We received our first hotel implementation in the U.S., through a global strategic partnership with a hospitality guest experience platform provider.
In February 2026 we have deployed the next generation of FIPS standard requirements in our product portfolio (140-3).

tamClaims.claim: Edge AI market projected to grow from $20 billion in 2024 to $190 billion in 2033
tamClaims.sentence: Edge AI, also covered as edge computing, according to Grandview research is projected to grow from approximately $20 billion in 2024 to nearly $190 billion in 2033.

tamClaims.claim: US military base modernization budgets in 2025 were $37 billion, Federal Defense program to grow to over $850 billion in 2029
tamClaims.sentence: According to US Congress budgeting program projections, US military base modernization budgets in 2025 were $37 billion as part of a model projecting the Federal Defense program to grow to over $850 billing in 2029.

tamClaims.claim: Global cybersecurity market projected to grow from $240 billion in 2024 to $500 billion in 2033
tamClaims.sentence: According to Grandview research the global cyber-security market is projected to grow from approximately $240 billion in 2024 to nearly $500 billion in 2033.

tamClaims.claim: Smart Transportation market projected to grow to over $250 billion by 2029
tamClaims.sentence: According to Markets and Markets, the Smart Transportation market is projected to grow to over $250 Billion by 2029, largely for intelligent transportation modernization.
